raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 3,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 1,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent correctly identified the conceptual issue with the draft, but did not fully address it in their output.",
    "R1.2": "The agent accurately assessed the logical consistency of the draft and proposed a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent failed to assess novelty properly, as they only asserted novelty without specific contrast.",
    "RX.1": "The agent correctly flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stayed within scope with one minor drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's output introduced no new errors or fabrications, but had a minor regression.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provided every non-cosmetic change with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent correctly identified the conceptual issue with the draft, but did not fully address it in their output.
rationale.R1.2: The agent accurately assessed the logical consistency of the draft and proposed a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent failed to assess novelty properly, as they only asserted novelty without specific contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The agent correctly flagged uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stayed within scope with one minor drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's output introduced no new errors or fabrications, but had a minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provided every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
